name: unity-headless-cli-skill
description: Marketplace for the Unity headless CLI plugin: a skill that sets up a project to drive a Unity Editor from the terminal with no GUI and no MCP server.

plugins.name: unity-headless-cli
plugins.description: Set up a Unity project to be driven headless from the terminal: adds com.unity.pipeline, writes docs/unity-cli-ref.md, and wires CLAUDE.md to point at it. Then Claude can create GameObjects, edit assets, run tests, and evaluate live C# over SSH, no GUI editor and no MCP server.
